{value:e0.TURBO,label:"Always Proceed",description:"Agent never asks for review. This maximizes the autonomy of the Agent, but also has the highest risk of the Agent operating over unsafe or injected Artifact content.",disabledInSecureMode:!0}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Allow List Terminal Commands",description:"Agent auto-executes commands matched by an allow list entry."+(e==="Cider"?' Only works when Auto-execution policy is set to "Request Review" on a go/limited-internet host.':"")+" For Unix shells, an allow list entry matches a command if its space-separated tokens form a prefix of the command's tokens. For PowerShell, the entry tokens may match any contiguous subsequence of the command tokens.",settingType:"list",sortAlphabetically:!0}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Deny List Terminal Commands",description:"Agent asks for permission before executing commands matched by a deny list entry."+(e==="Cider"?'Only works when Auto-execution policy is set to "Request Review" on a go/limited-internet host.':"")+" The deny list follows the same matching rules as the allow list and takes precedence over the allow list.",settingType:"list",sortAlphabetically:!0}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent Auto-Fix Lints",description:"When enabled, Agent is given awareness of lint errors created by its edits and may fix them without explicit user prompting.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Enable Workspace API",description:"When enabled, Agent can interact with Google Workspace through the API to search and read documents.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Editor",label:"Confirm Window Reload",description:'Toggle if a confirmation is shown when using the "Reload Window" button.',settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Demo Mode (Beta)",description:'When enabled, your UI will be slightly modified to ensure more consistent demos. This is only recommended for demo purposes. In most cases, you can run "Antigravity: Start Demo Mode" and "Antigravity: Stop Demo Mode" to control this switch and update your ~/.gemini/antigravity data directory.',settingType:"switch"}
Explain and Fix in Current Conversation

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Explain and Fix in Current Conversation",description:'When enabled, "Explain and Fix" actions will continue in the current conversation instead of starting a new one.',settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Strict Mode",description:"When enabled, enforces settings that prevent the agent from autonomously running targeted exploits and requires human review for all agent actions. Visit antigravity.google/docs/strict-mode for details.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent Non-Workspace File Access",description:"Allow Agent to view and edit files outside of the current workspace automatically. Use with caution: this provides the Agent access to additional potentially-relevant information, but also allows the Agent to access credential files, secrets, and other files outside of the workspace that could be targeted in prompt injection attacks or other exploits by malicious actors.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Terminal Sandbox",description:"When enabled, terminal commands run with sandbox restrictions.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Sandbox Allow Network",description:"When enabled, sandboxed commands are allowed to make network requests.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Shell Integration",description:"When enabled, Agent will use IDE's shell integration to detect and report terminal command execution. When disabled, the agent will use its own shell. Restart the application for this to take effect.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent Host Address",description:`When running commands, the agent will try to use this address, and fall back to to the "connector.host.featureDefault" host if not defined.

Note: hosts set here with auto-run enabled will have internet access restricted soon.`,settingType:"text",type:"string"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Review Policy",description:"Specifies Agent's behavior when asking for review on artifacts, which are documents it creates to enable a richer conversation experience.",options:$1t.map(t=>t.value),resolveOptionToString:t=>$1t.find(r=>r.value===t)?.label||"Request Review",resolveOptionToDescription:t=>{switch(t){case e0.TURBO:return"Agent never asks for review. This maximizes the autonomy of the Agent, but also has the highest risk of the Agent operating over unsafe or injected Artifact content.";case e0.ALWAYS:return"Agent always asks for review.";default:return""}},settingType:"dropdown"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Sounds for Agent",description:"When enabled, Antigravity will play a sound when Agent finishes generating a response.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Auto-Expand Changes Overview",description:"When enabled, the Changes Overview toolbar will automatically expand when Agent finishes generating a response.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"[Dev] GCP Project ID",description:"GCP Project ID for enterprise features.",settingType:"text",placeholder:"my-gcp-project-id",type:"string"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Conversation History",description:"When enabled, the agent will be able to access past conversations to inform its responses.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Knowledge",description:"When enabled, the agent will be able to access its knowledge base to inform its responses and automatically generate knowledge items in the background. Disabling this will prevent the agent from accessing existing knowledge items, but will not delete them.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Auto-Open Edited Files",description:"Open files in the background if Agent creates or edits them",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Open Agent on Reload",description:"Open Agent panel on window reload",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Appearance",label:"Verbose agent chat",description:"Display and preserve intermediate thinking steps",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Suggestions in Editor",description:"Show suggestions when typing in the editor",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Tab to Jump",description:"Predict the location of your next edit and navigates you there with a tab keypress.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Tab to Import",description:"Quickly add and update imports with a tab keypress.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Tab Speed",description:"Set the speed of tab suggestions",settingType:"dropdown",options:[sW.FAST,sW.SLOW],resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case sW.FAST:return"Fast";case sW.SLOW:return"Slow";default:return"Fast"}}}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Highlight After Accept",description:"Highlight newly inserted text after accepting a Tab completion.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Tab",label:"Tab Gitignore Access",description:"Allow Tab to view and edit the files in .gitignore. Use with caution if your .gitignore lists files containing credentials, secrets, or other sensitive information.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Enable Browser Tools",description:"When enabled, Agent can use browser tools to open URLs, read web pages, and interact with browser content. This allows the Agent access to important (and often critical) knowledge and methods of validation, but any browser integration does increase exposure to external malicious parties for security exploits.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Browser Javascript Execution Policy",description:"Controls whether the agent can run custom JavaScript to automate complex browser actions.",options:[vh.DISABLED,vh.ALWAYS_ASK,vh.TURBO],resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case vh.DISABLED:return"Disabled";case vh.ALWAYS_ASK:return"Request Review";case vh.TURBO:return"Always Proceed";default:return"Request Review"}},resolveOptionToDescription:t=>{switch(t){case vh.DISABLED:return"Block all browser JavaScript execution.";case vh.ALWAYS_ASK:return"Prompt for approval before running browser scripts.";case vh.TURBO:return"Allow full browser script execution without prompting.";default:return"Prompt for approval before running browser scripts."}},settingType:"dropdown"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Chrome Binary Path",description:"Path to the Chrome/Chromium executable. Leave empty for auto-detection.",settingType:"text",placeholder:"Absolute path to the Chrome/Chromium executable",type:"string"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Browser User Profile Path",description:"Custom path for the browser user profile directory. Leave empty for default (~/.gemini/antigravity-browser-profile).",settingType:"text",placeholder:"~/.gemini/antigravity-browser-profile",type:"string"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Browser",label:"Browser CDP Port",description:"Port number for Chrome DevTools Protocol remote debugging. Leave empty for default (9222).",settingType:"text",placeholder:"9222",type:"number"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Editor",label:"Show Selection Actions",description:'Show "Edit" and "Chat" buttons when selecting text in the editor.',settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Customizations",label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills.",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"App",label:"Prevent Sleep",description:"Prevent the computer from sleeping while the app is running.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"App",label:"Keep In Menu Bar",description:"The app will be accessible from the menu bar and will keep running in the background when all windows are closed.",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Account",label:"Enable Remote Control",description:"If enabled, you can manage your conversations from the Antigravity website. Please reload the application to apply this setting.",settingType:"switch"}
{environment:Ad.BACKGROUND_CITC_WORKSPACE_CLONE,label:"CitC Clone",description:"Clone current workspace into a new independent workspace",icon:"cloud"}
{label:"Enable Telemetry",description:`When toggled on, ${r.product.nameShort} collects usage data to help Google enhance performance and features.`,userSettings:u,disabled:!o}
{label:"Marketing Emails",description:`Receive product updates, tips, and promotions from Google ${r.product.nameShort} via email.`,userSettings:u}

{label:"Enable Remote Control",description:"If enabled, you can manage your conversations from the Antigravity website. Please reload the application to apply this setting.",checked:N,onCheckedChange:V}
{label:"Not Signed In",description:`Sign in to use ${Z7i.name}!`,rightElement:p(Eo,{onClick:()=>t.showLoginFlow(),children:"Sign In"})}
{action:"read_file",label:"File Reads",description:"Allow/deny agent read access to specific files or directories.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., /path/to/file",borderless:!0}
{action:"write_file",label:"File Writes",description:"Allow/deny agent write access to specific files or directories.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., /path/to/file",borderless:!0}
{action:"read_url",label:"Read URLs",description:"Allow/deny agent read access to specific URLs or domains.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., https://example.com",borderless:!0}
{action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Allow/deny agent command execution outside the sandbox.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}
{action:"mcp",label:"MCP Tools",description:"External tools the agent can call via Model Context Protocol.",grants:s,onChangeGrants:o,placeholder:"Enter tool name or server...",borderless:!0}
{label:"File Access Rules",badge:Y>0?Y:void 0,description:"Configure allowed and denied paths for file reads and writes.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("file")},children:"Open"})}
{label:"Network Access Rules",badge:O>0?O:void 0,description:"Configure allowed and denied URLs for reading.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("network")},children:"Open"})}
{label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",badge:W>0?W:void 0,description:"Configure allowed commands outside the sandbox.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("unsandboxed")},children:"Open"})}
{label:"MCP Tools",badge:Z>0?Z:void 0,description:"Configure external tools via Model Context Protocol.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{re("mcp")},children:"Open"})}
Outside of folders file access policy

{label:"Outside of folders file access policy",description:"Configures how the agent tries to access files outside of its working folders.",value:et===Ju.ALLOW?"Allow":et===Ju.DENY?"Deny":"Always Ask",options:[Ju.ASK,Ju.ALLOW,Ju.DENY],displayResolver:it=>it===Ju.ALLOW?"Allow":it===Ju.DENY?"Deny":"Always Ask",onSelect:it=>{ze(it),d?.(it)},wide:!0}

{label:"Terminal Command Auto Execution",description:"Controls whether terminal commands require your approval before running.",value:a===rl.EAGER?"Always Proceed":a===rl.PROCEED_IN_SANDBOX?"Proceed in Sandbox":"Require Review",options:[rl.OFF,rl.PROCEED_IN_SANDBOX,rl.EAGER].filter(it=>ae!=="windows"||it!==rl.PROCEED_IN_SANDBOX),displayResolver:it=>it===rl.EAGER?"Always Proceed":it===rl.PROCEED_IN_SANDBOX?"Proceed in Sandbox":"Require Review",onSelect:i,wide:!0}
{label:"Enable Sandbox Mode (Preview)",description:"Restricts agent tools to a secure, isolated local sandbox.",rightElement:p(nF,{checked:r,onCheckedChange:it=>{n(it)}})}

{label:"Artifact Review Policy",description:"Specifies Agent's behavior when asking for review on artifacts, which are documents it creates to enable a richer conversation experience.",value:e==="turbo"?"Always Proceed":"Always Ask",options:["turbo","always"],displayResolver:it=>it==="turbo"?"Always Proceed":"Always Ask",onSelect:t,wide:!0}
{settingKey:Mr.SANDBOX_ALLOW_NETWORK,label:"Sandbox Allow Network",description:"When enabled, sandboxed commands are allowed to make network requests."}
{settingKey:Mr.ENABLE_SHELL_INTEGRATION,label:"Enable Shell Integration",description:"When enabled, Agent will use IDE's shell integration to detect and report terminal command execution."}
{settingKey:Mr.ALLOW_AGENT_ACCESS_NON_WORKSPACE_FILES,label:"Agent Non-Workspace File Access",description:"Allows the agent to access files outside of your current workspace."}
{settingKey:Mr.DISABLE_AUTO_OPEN_EDITED_FILES,label:"Auto-Open Edited Files",description:"Open files in the background if Agent creates or edits them"}

{settingKey:Mr.DISABLE_CASCADE_AUTO_FIX_LINTS,label:"Agent Auto-Fix Lints",description:"When enabled, Agent is given awareness of lint errors created by its edits and may fix them without explicit user prompting."}
{settingKey:Mr.CONVERSATION_HISTORY_ENABLED,label:"Conversation History",description:"When enabled, the agent will be able to access past conversations to inform its responses."}

{settingKey:Mr.KNOWLEDGE_ENABLED,label:"Knowledge",description:"When enabled, the agent will be able to access its knowledge base to inform its responses and automatically generate knowledge items in the background."}
Explain and Fix in Current Conversation

{settingKey:Mr.EXPLAIN_AND_FIX_IN_CURRENT_CONVERSATION,label:"Explain and Fix in Current Conversation",description:"When enabled, 'Explain and Fix' actions will continue in the current conversation instead of starting a new one."}
{settingKey:Mr.DISABLE_OPEN_CASCADE_ON_RELOAD,label:"Open Agent on Reload",description:"Open Agent panel on window reload"}
{settingKey:Mr.ENABLE_SOUNDS_FOR_SPECIAL_EVENTS,label:"Enable Sounds for Agent",description:"When enabled, Antigravity will play a sound when Agent finishes generating a response."}

{settingKey:Mr.ENABLE_AUTO_EXPAND_TOOLBAR,label:"Auto-Expand Changes Overview",description:"When enabled, the Changes Overview toolbar will automatically expand when Agent finishes generating a response."}

{action:"read_file",label:"Read Files",description:"Paths the agent can read.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}

{action:"write_file",label:"Write Files",description:"Paths the agent can modify.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}

{action:"command",label:"Terminal Commands",description:"Terminal commands the agent can execute.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter command (e.g., git, blaze)...",borderless:!0}

{action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Commands the agent can run outside the sandbox.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}

{action:"mcp",label:"MCP Tools",description:"External tools the agent can call via Model Context Protocol.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter tool name or server...",borderless:!0}

{action:"read_url",label:"Read URLs",description:"URLs the agent can read or open in the browser.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter URL pattern...",borderless:!0}

{action:"execute_url",label:"Execute URLs",description:"URLs the agent can actuate on using the browser.",grants:a,onChangeGrants:W=>void i.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,W),placeholder:"Enter URL pattern...",borderless:!0}
{settingKey:Mr.DISABLE_EAGER_CLONING,label:"Disable Eager Cloning",description:"Disable pre-warming of workspace clones."}
{settingKey:Mr.MAX_CLONED_WORKSPACES,label:"Maximum Active Workspaces",description:"Maximum number of concurrent active source workspaces tracked in the clone pools.",type:"number",min:1}
{settingKey:Mr.MAX_CLONES_PER_WORKSPACE,label:"Maximum Clones Per Workspace",description:"Maximum number of pre-warmed workspace clones cached per active source workspace.",type:"number",min:1,max:8}

{action:"execute_url",label:"Execute URLs",description:"Allow/deny agent browser actuation access to specific URLs.",grants:r,onChangeGrants:f=>{t.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,f)},placeholder:"e.g., https://example.com",borderless:!0}
{label:"Browser Actuation Rules",description:"Configure allowed and denied URLs for browser actuation.",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{u("execute_url")},children:"Edit"})}
{value:"*",label:"All tools (*)",description:"Hook will trigger if any tool is executed."}
{value:"run_command",label:"run_command",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command."}
{value:"run_command|view_file",label:"run_command or view_file",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command or view_file."}
{value:"browser_.*",label:"Browser tools (browser_.*)",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name starts with browser_."}

{settingKey:Mr.INCLUDE_JETSKI_DEFAULT_CUSTOMIZATIONS,label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills."}
{label:"Create Documents",description:"Gives the agent permission to create and upload documents to google drive",checked:g.canCreate,onCheckedChange:C}
{label:"Search",description:"Gives the agent permission to search through google drive. The agent will only see file titles, not file contents",checked:g.canSearch,onCheckedChange:N}

{label:"Marketplace Item URL",description:`Changes the base URL on each extension page. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceGalleryItemURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/item"}

{label:"Marketplace Gallery URL",description:`Changes the base URL for marketplace search results. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceExtensionGalleryServiceURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/gallery"}

{label:"Enable AI Credit Overages",description:`When toggled on, ${s} will use your AI credits to fulfill model requests once you're out of model quota. ${s} will always use your model quota first before using AI credits.`,isSwitchOn:F,pushUpdate:y}

{label:"Delete Project",description:"Permanently delete this project and all of its conversations.",rightElement:p("button",{onClick:()=>g(!0),className:"px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors",children:"Delete Project"})}

{action:"write_file",label:"Write Files",description:"Paths the agent can modify inside this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}

{action:"command",label:"Terminal Commands",description:"Terminal commands the agent can execute in this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter command (e.g., git, blaze)...",borderless:!0}

{action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Commands the agent can run outside the sandbox in this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}
{action:"mcp",label:"MCP Tools",description:"External tools the agent can call via Model Context Protocol.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter tool name or server...",borderless:!0}

{action:"execute_url",label:"Execute URLs",description:"URLs the agent can actuate on in this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter URL pattern...",borderless:!0}
